# AyudaVE

AyudaVE is a public emergency-aid web application for Venezuela earthquake response.

Main site: http://ayudave.mranalytics.info/
Open data feed: http://ayudave.mranalytics.info/api.php?action=export_public
API metadata: http://ayudave.mranalytics.info/api.php?action=metadata
Sync status: http://ayudave.mranalytics.info/api.php?action=sync_status
OpenAPI contract: http://ayudave.mranalytics.info/openapi.json
Sources index: http://ayudave.mranalytics.info/sources.json
Sitemap: http://ayudave.mranalytics.info/sitemap.xml

Useful pages:
- http://ayudave.mranalytics.info/ayuda-terremoto-venezuela.html
- http://ayudave.mranalytics.info/como-reportar-ayuda-venezuela.html
- http://ayudave.mranalytics.info/directorio-ayuda-venezuela.html
- http://ayudave.mranalytics.info/datos-abiertos-ayudave.html

Data policy:
- Public export excludes private contacts and secrets.
- Source attribution is preserved when records are synchronized from external public sources.
- People-missing/person-sensitive data should not be imported into the public map without a separate authenticated privacy workflow.
